summary.narrative: Audit completed without failed checks. Review 16 warnings and confirm whether each risk is acceptable or requires remediation.

items.finding: Detected project stack: Node.
items.recommendation: Review stack-specific findings and keep repository manifests up to date.

items.finding: Node package manifest package.json is present.
items.recommendation: Keep package.json dependency and script metadata current.

items.finding: Node dependency lock file is present: package-lock.json.
items.recommendation: Commit one lock file and keep it synchronized with package.json.

items.finding: TypeScript configuration check skipped because TypeScript usage was not detected.
items.recommendation: No action is required unless TypeScript sources are added.

items.finding: Repository does not contain a .gitignore file.
items.recommendation: Add a .gitignore file and exclude dependencies, local environment files, generated reports, and build output.

items.finding: No .github/workflows CI configuration directory was found.
items.recommendation: Add CI configuration to run repeatable validation on changes.

items.finding: No supported ESLint or Biome configuration was found.
items.recommendation: Add an ESLint, Biome, or equivalent lint configuration and run it in CI.

items.finding: No non-example .env files were found in the target project.
items.recommendation: Keep real environment files out of version control and provide sanitized .env.example files where useful.

items.finding: Found 2 secret-like pattern matches in selected text files. Matches are heuristic and may include safe fixtures or placeholders.
items.recommendation: Review each match. Move real secrets to environment variables or a secret manager and rotate any credential that may have been exposed.

items.finding: npm audit reported no critical or high severity vulnerabilities.
items.recommendation: Continue monitoring dependency advisories and review lower severity findings separately.

items.finding: No obvious debug exposure patterns were found in package.json scripts.
items.recommendation: Continue reviewing runtime deployment configuration separately.

items.finding: Runtime response is missing recommended security headers: content-security-policy, x-frame-options, x-content-type-options, referrer-policy.
items.recommendation: Configure the service or reverse proxy to send appropriate browser security headers.

items.finding: Runtime response allows requests from any origin with Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *.
items.recommendation: Restrict CORS to explicitly trusted origins unless unrestricted public access is intentional.

items.finding: No common debug or API documentation endpoints returned a successful response.
items.recommendation: Continue reviewing framework-specific debug routes separately.

items.finding: API runtime service is reachable at the configured baseUrl.
items.recommendation: Review configured endpoint findings and keep the runtime target configuration current.

items.finding: Health endpoint returned status 200 in 2ms with the expected basic response shape.
items.recommendation: Keep endpoint expectations current as the API contract evolves.

items.finding: Users endpoint returned status 200 in 4ms with the expected basic response shape.
items.recommendation: Keep endpoint expectations current as the API contract evolves.

items.finding: UI runtime service is reachable and Playwright Chromium launched successfully.
items.recommendation: Review configured page findings and keep the runtime target configuration current.

items.finding: Home loaded at mobile with status 200.
items.recommendation: Keep this page path covered as the UI evolves.

items.finding: Home emitted 2 browser console errors at mobile.
items.recommendation: Investigate and remove unexpected browser console errors.
evidence: Intentional demo UI console error for QA audit detection.
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (Not Found)

items.finding: Home contains 1 broken image at mobile.
items.recommendation: Fix or remove image references that do not load successfully.

items.finding: Home contains 1 image without alt text at mobile.
items.recommendation: Add meaningful alt text for informative images or an empty alt attribute for decorative images.

items.finding: Home passed the lightweight accessibility baseline at mobile.
items.recommendation: Run a dedicated accessibility tool for broader WCAG coverage.

items.finding: Home loaded at desktop with status 200.
items.recommendation: Keep this page path covered as the UI evolves.

items.finding: Home emitted 2 browser console errors at desktop.
items.recommendation: Investigate and remove unexpected browser console errors.
evidence: Intentional demo UI console error for QA audit detection.
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (Not Found)

items.finding: Home contains 1 broken image at desktop.
items.recommendation: Fix or remove image references that do not load successfully.

items.finding: Home contains 1 image without alt text at desktop.
items.recommendation: Add meaningful alt text for informative images or an empty alt attribute for decorative images.

items.finding: Home passed the lightweight accessibility baseline at desktop.
items.recommendation: Run a dedicated accessibility tool for broader WCAG coverage.

items.finding: LLM analysis was not executed: OPENAI_API_KEY is not configured
items.recommendation: Configure OPENAI_API_KEY only when paid contextual AI review is intended. The deterministic fallback remains available without it.

items.finding: Setup documentation does not show an install command.
items.recommendation: Document one reproducible dependency installation command.

items.finding: Setup documentation does not show how to run the target project.
items.recommendation: Document the command required to start the local project.

items.finding: Setup documentation does not describe environment-variable requirements.
items.recommendation: Document required and optional environment variables, using safe example values only.

items.finding: Setup documentation does not show a test or audit command.
items.recommendation: Document at least one validation command and the expected result.
